title: Buggy and Alvida Return
description: On pages 9–12, buggy and alvida return focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as news of Luffy’s bounty spreads across the East Blue as the crew sails toward their next destination.
scene: On pages 9–12, buggy and alvida return focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as news of Luffy’s bounty spreads across the East Blue as the crew sails toward their next destination.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You do...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That island,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Is proof that we're close to the grand line!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: On that island, there's a famous town called "loguetown."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's also known as the town of the beginning and the end.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's the birthplace of the pirate King Roger...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...as well as his execution spot.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So that's the town that the pirate king died at...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: shall we go?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: loguetown (town of the beginning and the end)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Whoa! What a big town!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: So the pirate age all began from here, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: OK, then! I'm gonna go see the execution stand!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Seems like I can get some good ingredients and food here.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: As well as fine women, (7)

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm going to go look for some equipment to buy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I do have something I want to buy too but...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'll happily lend you some money. At 300% interest, that is.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Seems like that monster ain't with you today!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It's all because of you that our boss is in prison!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: If you still haven't learned your lesson,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I shall gladly be your opponent.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Did I just hear that correctly!? A little miss like you is going to be our opponent!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Well, why not!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: When you die, tell that monster friend of yours,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That our dream of going to grand line was broken all because of him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hmm?

summary: This part shifts the story from local East Blue battles to the wider pirate world reacting to Luffy’s new bounty.
